<!-- Generated by agents-reverse-engineer v1.2.12 -->

# workflows

Two-workflow CI/CD suite for a NUR (Nix User Repository): one builds and caches packages across nixpkgs channels, the other tracks upstream releases and commits, auto-updating `pkgs/*/default.nix` and opening squash-merged PRs daily.

## Contents

### CI & Cache

- [build.yml](./build.yml) ‚Äî Evaluates NUR package set, builds via `nix-build-uncached` against `ci.nix#cacheOutputs`, pushes to Cachix, and POSTs to `nur-update.nix-community.org` for registry sync. Matrix over `nixos-unstable`, `nixpkgs-unstable`, `nixos-25.11`, `nixos-26.05`.

### Automation

- [auto-update-packages.yml](./auto-update-packages.yml) ‚Äî Daily matrix job per tracked package (`opencode`, `spec-kit`, `cco`); fetches latest release or commit SHA from GitHub API, recalculates `nix-prefetch-url` hash, patches `pkgs/<name>/default.nix`, builds, opens PR, auto-squash-merges on build success. Triggers `build.yml` on completion via `trigger-nur-sync` job.

## Architecture / Data Flow

```
cron / workflow_dispatch
        ‚îÇ
        ‚ñº
auto-update-packages (matrix: opencode, spec-kit, cco)
  ‚îú‚îÄ GitHub API ‚Üí latest version/rev
  ‚îú‚îÄ SRI hash: nix-prefetch-url (source) / curl+unpack+nix hash path (binary asset)
  ‚îú‚îÄ sed-patch pkgs/<name>/default.nix (version, rev, hash / per-arch hash_key)
  ‚îú‚îÄ nix build .#<name> ‚Üí build_success
  ‚îú‚îÄ peter-evans/create-pull-request ‚Üí PR (draft if build fails)
  ‚îú‚îÄ gh pr merge --auto --squash (on build_success only)
  ‚îî‚îÄ trigger-nur-sync ‚Üí gh workflow run build.yml
        ‚îÇ
        ‚ñº
build.yml (matrix: 4 nixpkgs channels)
  ‚îú‚îÄ nix-env eval check (restrict-eval)
  ‚îú‚îÄ nix-build-uncached ci.nix#cacheOutputs
  ‚îú‚îÄ cachix push (conditional on cachixName sentinel)
  ‚îî‚îÄ NUR registry notify (conditional on nurRepo sentinel)
```

## Behavioral Contracts

| Contract | Value |
|---|---|
| Auto-update schedule | `cron: '30 3 * * *'` |
| Build schedule | `cron: '51 2 * * *'` |
| Package file path | `pkgs/<matrix.package.name>/default.nix` |
| PR title format | `chore: update <name> v<current> ‚Üí v<latest>` |
| Branch name format | `update-<name>-<latest_version>` |
| Commit-type version format | `0-unstable-<YYYY-MM-DD>` |
| Release version strip | `sed 's/^v//'` |
| Archive URL (release) | `v$LATEST_VERSION.tar.gz` |
| Archive URL (commit) | `$LATEST_REV.tar.gz` |
| Asset URL (binary) | `releases/download/v$LATEST_VERSION/<asset>` |
| Binary hash patch | `sed` on `"<hash_key>" = "..."` (per-arch key in `hashes`) |
| Duplicate detection window | `git log --oneline --grep="update <name>.*<version>" --since="30 days ago"` |
| Cachix sentinel (skips push) | `cachixName == '<YOUR_CACHIX_NAME>'` |
| NUR notify sentinel (skips curl) | `nurRepo == '<YOUR_REPO_NAME>'` |
| NUR notify endpoint | `https://nur-update.nix-community.org/update?repo=<nurRepo>` |
| Stale branch prefix | `origin/update-<name>-` |
| Superseded PR close comment | `"Superseded by newer version update"` |
| Build CI entry point | `ci.nix` attr `cacheOutputs` |
| Bot git identity | `github-actions[bot]` / `github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com` |

## Tracked Package Matrix (`auto-update-packages.yml`)

| `name` | `owner/repo` | `type` | `branch` |
|---|---|---|---|
| `opencode` | `anomalyco/opencode` | `binary` | ‚Äî |
| `spec-kit` | `github/spec-kit` | `release` | ‚Äî |
| `cco` | `nikvdp/cco` | `commit` | `master` |

`binary` packages add `asset` (release-asset filename) and `hash_key` (the platform key patched in `hashes = { ... }`). `opencode`: `asset: opencode-linux-x64.tar.gz`, `hash_key: x86_64-linux`.

## Configuration Requirements

| Secret | Used by |
|---|---|
| `GITHUB_TOKEN` | Both workflows ‚Äî Nix `access-tokens`, `gh` CLI |
| `CACHIX_SIGNING_KEY` | `build.yml` Cachix push |
| `CACHIX_AUTH_TOKEN` | `build.yml` Cachix push |

No custom secrets beyond `GITHUB_TOKEN` needed for `auto-update-packages.yml`. `build.yml` requires `ci.nix` at repo root exposing `cacheOutputs` attr. `nurRepo` must be set to actual repo name to enable NUR registry notifications.
